name: shelldesk
description: Blank Electron shell for a GUI SSH client.
author: liubaicai <liushuai.baicai@hotmail.com>

scripts.release: pnpm build && cross-env npm_config_arch=x64 NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0190 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win nsis --x64 --publish=never
scripts.pack: pnpm build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0190 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --publish=never
scripts.pack:dir: pnpm build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0190 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --dir --publish=never
scripts.pack:win: pnpm build && cross-env npm_config_arch=x64 NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0190 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win --x64 --publish=never && cross-env npm_config_arch=arm64 NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0190 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win --arm64 --publish=never
scripts.pack:win-x64: pnpm build && cross-env npm_config_arch=x64 NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0190 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win --x64 --publish=never
scripts.pack:win-arm64: pnpm build && cross-env npm_config_arch=arm64 NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0190 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win --arm64 --publish=never
scripts.pack:mac: pnpm build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0190 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac --publish=never
scripts.pack:linux: pnpm build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0190 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --linux --publish=never
scripts.pack:linux-x64: pnpm build && cross-env npm_config_arch=x64 NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0190 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --linux --x64 --publish=never
scripts.pack:linux-arm64: pnpm build && cross-env npm_config_arch=arm64 NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0190 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --linux --arm64 --publish=never
